Featured in

The mind moves fast. Thoughts rarely wait.

Introducing: A Day With Stream

Watch the Film

Stream is your extended self.
It holds what you share.
It builds ideas as they form.

Go

Resume & control your music & podcasts with your phone in your pocket

Speak

Hold to speak & release to send, confirmed silently with in-ring haptics

Think

Organize notes, talk through ideas, and search the web with your own Inner Voice

Private Mic

Whisper in a crowd

Glass Touch Surface

Hold, tap, swipe

Silent Haptics

Feel every capture

Aluminum-Resin Body

Unbelievably light

Custom Curved Battery

All day use, obsessively tested

Convo

Rapid push-to-talk

Web

Weather, news, & more

Inner Voice

A voice unique to you

Timeline

Notepad

Notes

Instant capture & organize
